Class KafkaStreamsProducerProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.properties.KafkaProducerProperties
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.streams.properties.KafkaStreamsProducerProperties
public class KafkaStreamsProducerProperties extends KafkaProducerProperties
Extended properties for Kafka Streams producer.
Author:
Marius Bogoevici, Soby Chacko
